root.text: Ah… a living soul. It has been ages since one has walked these halls. Do not fear. I am Lysander, the keeper of this forsaken place. You have come seeking escape… or answers, yes?

who_are_you.text: A fair question. I was once the warden of knowledge here, before the walls turned cold and the doors sealed themselves. Now, I guide wanderers… though few make it far.

get_out.text: Escape… always the first instinct. But here, leaving is earned, not granted. Still, I admire your clarity of purpose.

final_advice.text: Whether you seek truth or freedom, your path begins the same: survive the trials, unravel the locks, and obey the rules of this place. I will appear when you need me… though not always when you want me. Step forward, and may the shadows be gentle with you.
